name: Hans Kim
blurb: Based in Austin, Texas, he is known for a laid-back delivery and provocative one-liners.
bio: Hans Kim is an American stand-up comedian who became a fan-favorite regular on the Kill Tony podcast after his 2016 debut. Based in Austin, Texas, he is known for a laid-back delivery and provocative one-liners. He has opened for Joe Rogan and Tony Hinchcliffe.

timeline.ev: Becomes a recurring Kill Tony regular and tours nationally

bits.t: Hans Kim on Kill Tony 636 (with Ron White and Pauly Shore)
